title: Uzbe'k
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Uzbe'k''''' was the name given to a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transports]] that carried Rebel personnel from the [[Defense of the Anvil|exploding]] [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] ''[[Maximus]]''.

They were able to make it to the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] [[Anvil (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Anvil'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''

[[Category:Alliance to Restore the Republic starship groups]]
[[Category:Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transports|*]]
